_comment: Phase 274 / STATS-05 -- German translations for new SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_* trans-units. Brand 'FSB' and 'MCP' kept verbatim per DO-NOT-TRANSLATE.md. Placeholders preserved byte-for-byte.
